title: Thank you for signing up!

candidate.message: You're now on our waitlist. We'll contact you as soon as a spot opens up.

recruiter.message: Your pilot program access request has been recorded. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to finalize your registration.

emailConfirmation: A confirmation email has been sent to you

nextSteps.title: In the meantime, here's what you can do

prepare.title: Gather your projects
prepare.description: Prepare your best projects, open-source contributions and achievements.

wait.title: Stay tuned
wait.description: We'll contact you as soon as a spot opens up on the platform.

prepare.title: Prepare your criteria
prepare.description: Define the types of profiles and skills you're looking for in your recruitments.

wait.title: Wait for our call
wait.description: Our team will contact you within 24 hours for a personalized onboarding.

socialProof.candidate: candidates are already on the waitlist
socialProof.recruiter: companies have already joined the pilot program
